heading: Certain seeds not adapted for general agricultural use
label: 1585 Certain seeds not adapted for general agricultural use
text: Whenever the Secretary of Agriculture, after a public hearing, determines that seed of alfalfa or red clover from any foreign country is not adapted for general agricultural use in the United States, the Secretary shall publish the determination and the reasons for the determination.
